# Title

**Status:** Stable  
**Category:** text  
**Import:** `drawui`  
**Emitted class(es):** `Title`

Panel title text (`Title` class).

_Source: `src/primitives/ui.js`_

## Import

```js
import { Title } from "drawui";
```

## Examples

### Title

```js
return new Title("Panel title style");
```
